name: rpglitch
description: RPGlitch - AI-powered storytelling platform for Perchance with comprehensive rules system for development

scripts.check: npm run lint && npm test && npm run build && npm run validate
scripts.lint: eslint --config build/config/eslint.config.mjs apps tests build/scripts && stylelint "apps/**/*.{css,scss}" --config build/config/stylelint.config.js && node build/scripts/run-htmlhint.js && npm run lint:md
scripts.lint:fix: eslint --config build/config/eslint.config.mjs --fix apps tests build/scripts && stylelint "apps/**/*.{css,scss}" --config build/config/stylelint.config.js --fix && node build/scripts/run-htmlhint.js && npm run lint:md:fix
scripts.rules:update: echo 'Use "update memory bank" to refresh memory bank files'
scripts.housekeeping: node build/scripts/combine-views.js repo recent && npm run lint
scripts.clean:output: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('build/output', { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('🧹 cleaned build/output');"
scripts.clean:libs: node -e "require('fs').rmSync('build/local_libs', { recursive: true, force: true }); console.log('🧹 cleaned build/local_libs');"

author: Glitch
